description: The FacetAnchorsSettings component is used to control the Settings for facet anchors.

fields.UseFacetAnchors: Whether to allow the use of facet anchors
fields.FacetAnchorToggle: which controller to replace the dash open function with the opening facet anchors function.
fields.AnimationSpeed: How fast facet anchors open and close.
fields.ShowContainerBackground: Whether to show the background visual of facet anchors.
